title: lasthenia tenella
intro: Lasthenia tenella, also known as slender goldfields, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lasthenia tenella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lasthenia tenella can be made by infusing the dried flowers in hot water or using it as a tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
